summary: A clip from a news segment. It shows a booking-style photo of a young man with dark curly hair against a pale backdrop, then a quote card over a gavel background reading DHS is calling on sanctuary politicians in Dane County, Wisconsin to NOT release this criminal from jail back onto the streets to commit more crimes. We need Wisconsin sanctuary politicians to cooperate, attributed to a DHS Acting Assistant Secretary.

script.scene: A booking-style photo of a young man against a pale backdrop.
A quote card over a gavel background presents a DHS statement calling on Dane County, Wisconsin sanctuary politicians not to release the man.

notable_text: DHS is calling on sanctuary politicians in Dane County, Wisconsin to NOT release this criminal from jail back onto the streets to commit more crimes. We need Wisconsin sanctuary politicians to cooperate
